title: aglaia pedicellata
intro: Aglaia pedicellata is a plant species in the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the Southeast Asian aglaia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Aglaia pedicellata is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it can also be found in various traditional medicine formulations in Southeast Asian countries.
